channel.title: Foldable IPhone on Lucky Taorem | Tech & AI Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Foldable IPhone on Lucky Taorem | Tech & AI Blog

item.title: Foldable iPhone Ultra On Track
item.description: Apple's foldable iPhone remains on track for a September debut despite rumors of delays and engineering hurdles.

item.title: Apple Approves OLED Panels
item.description: Apple approves Samsung Display's OLED panels for foldable iPhone, with a yield rate of over 80% and a 3-year exclusive agreement
